empty.title: You haven't created a tournament yet
empty.body: Create one, add the participants, and Ronda generates every match.

new.title: New tournament
new.subtitle: You can change any of this until you publish
new.name: Tournament name
new.timezoneHint: Sets the time each player sees. The Canaries are an hour behind.
new.datesHint: Optional. You can add these later.

format.round_robinHint: Everyone plays everyone. Good if there's time and not too many of you.
format.single_elimHint: Lose and you're out. The quickest format.
format.double_elimHint: Nobody goes home after one defeat. Needs more courts.
format.groups_knockoutHint: Groups first, then the bracket. The usual shape for a one-day event.
format.swissHint: Each round pairs you with someone at your level. For a big field and little time.

loadFailed.title: We couldn't load your tournaments
loadFailed.body: The connection to the server failed. Try again.

error.createFailed: We couldn't create the tournament. Try again.
error.noClub: Your account has no club attached. Get in touch and we'll fix it.
